title: PRÄSENT - Rayon Raffia Biodegradable Ribbon Light Pink 100 meter spool
features: Rayon Raffia 100 meter spool completes multiple projects at a great value.
Create layered accents and bows for craft, floral or packaging.
description: From the manufacturer From decorative ribbon to gift ribbon to pull bow – Präsent offers the right material for packaging and decorating. Perfect for beautifully wrapped gifts and magical decorations for celebrations such as weddings and Christmas. Our know-how makes us one of the most versatile manufacturers, for gift and decorative ribbons of the highest quality, known far beyond the borders of Germany. Present gift ribbon, plain Rayon Raffia raffia ribbon For craft projects & gifts for any occasion With the Rayon Raffia raffia ribbons from Präsent, you can not only create versatile crafts and packaging, but also beautify gifts and attach decorations pretty. The ribbons are suitable for numerous occasions, whether for decorating autumn door wreaths, bouquets, as table decoration for Easter, wedding, birthday, Halloween or children's birthday. The plain ribbons are always a great eye-catcher. In addition, the 100 m spool is enough for many great decorations. Ideal for decorating and crafting for any event Beautiful gift packaging for family and friends Made from renewable raw materials (viscose) Length: 100 m Whether for a birthday, Easter or Christmas – Präsent offers a wide range of decorative and gift ribbons in many colours, materials and widths. The extensive range is suitable for any celebration, decoration and craft idea. The Rayon Raffia raffia ribbon embellishes any gift or table decoration with a wide range of colours. A great gift for mum, dad, grandma, grandpa, partner, best friend or favourite colleague. In the production of the bands, sustainable electricity and REACH compliant materials are used. The colourful raffia ribbons are made from low-pollutant viscose, which is 100% degradable and compostable.
